facts: wild_boar_proxy/ui_shell.py:8-9,418-423,802-818 adds stale metadata and helper logic for external action results.
Support/open-file actions are implemented in wild_boar_proxy/web_ui.py:132-207 and rendered in a dedicated support section at wild_boar_proxy/web_ui.py:966-979.
Support/open-file actions do not parse files and are not used as truth inputs.
wild_boar_proxy/web_ui.py:1018-1024 marks cached external actions stale on GET.
wild_boar_proxy/web_ui.py:116-128 downgrades only the external-models section to integration_failure on external refresh failure while keeping runtime/accounts truth intact.
No new primary command semantics or runtime.py changes were introduced in the scoped files.
residual_risks: _default_support_opener() is platform-specific and not directly exercised in tests.
Directory targets are intentionally always treated as available by design.
